title: lavah #3867
definition:
1) to join, be joined
    1a) (Qal) to join, be joined, attend
    1b) (Niphal) to join oneself to, be joined unto
 2) to borrow, lend
    2a) (Qal) to borrow
    2b) (Hiphil) to cause to borrow, lend to
